title: Master Flamespark
content:
Master Flamespark
 is the current Lord of the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
. He is the mastermind behind the war between the Allheaven Star System and the 
Alliance Star System
.

Background
[
]

He was once an elder in the 
Cultivation Alliance
. He holds a deep grudge against the Alliance Star System as he was thrown out of it by 
Master Zhong Xuan
. It led him to scheme for thousands years in order to start a war between the 2 star systems.

{This grudge is likely related to Master Zhong Xuan doing something less than stellar towards Master Flamespark's Dao Partner however this is just speculation as Er Gen just glosses over the matter.}

History
[
]

Master Flamespark refined 49 fragments of 
Thunder Celestial Realm
 into a powerful treasure and used 49 origin souls as its treasure spirit; these included 28 
Illusory Yin
 origin souls, 14 
Corporeal Yang
 origin souls, two 
Nirvana Scryer
 origin souls, 
Blood Ancestor
's and another 
Nirvana Cleanser
's origin souls, two 
Nirvana Shatterer
 origin souls, and the origin soul of the 
Slaughter Celestial Lord
, 
Rain Celestial Realm
’s rank 6 Celestial Lord.
